narrative:
Trenton 2 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,116 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.5 percentage points.
